subcodes.first_line: O thou who art named after His Holiness the Exalted One! Since thou hast been given this blessed name, thou must acquire a portion and share of His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت اعلی چون باین اسم مبارک تسمیه گشتی باید بهره و نصیبی از فیض او
subcodes.subjects: @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Manifestation of God as sun
